name: wmkf_appreviewersuggestion-stage2a
_comment: Stage 2a slice 1 additions to wmkf_appreviewersuggestion. Engagement-scope contact corrections, decline reason structured + free-text, honorarium opt-out, withdrawal stamp, and policy-version lookups. The two policy-version lookups depend on wmkf_policyversion existing, so this file lives in wave3 (which is processed after wave3 entities are created in 01/02/03).

attributes.description: Reviewer's free-text follow-up to the structured decline-reason picklist. Captured at Stage 2a decline. Originally locked for addition in S136 reviewer migration plan; first use is Stage 2a slice 1.

First name confirmed by the reviewer at Stage 2a invitation landing. Engagement-scoped — does not write to contact.firstname or potentialreviewer.wmkf_firstname. Promotion to directory/CRM is a separate staff-controlled step.
Last name confirmed by the reviewer at Stage 2a. Engagement-scoped per same rule as wmkf_ReviewerFirstName.
How the reviewer prefers to be addressed in correspondence about this engagement. Optional. Engagement-scoped.
Job title at engagement scope. Distinct from contact.jobtitle which is staff-curated.
Email address the reviewer wants to receive correspondence at for this engagement. Engagement-scoped — never writes to contact.emailaddress1/2/3. Replaces the prior plan's emailaddress2/3 routing.
ORCID identifier confirmed by the reviewer at Stage 2a. Engagement-scoped.
Structured decline-reason category captured at Stage 2a decline. Companion to free-text wmkf_DeclineReason. Optional — staff-analytics aggregation surface.
Reviewer's freeform referral text at decline — names + affiliations of suggested alternative reviewers. Optional. Triggers a deep-link-to-PD email when populated (deferred to a follow-up build).
Set when staff cancels a pending invitation because enough confirmed reviewers have accepted. Distinct from declined (reviewer initiative) and no_response (timeout) for analytics purposes.
Reviewer chose to decline the honorarium at Stage 2a accept. Captured for staff planning purposes.
Timestamp when the reviewer acknowledged the COI policy at Stage 2a accept. Companion to wmkf_CoiPolicyVersion lookup which pins to the specific policy version row the reviewer saw.
Timestamp when the reviewer acknowledged the AI-use policy at Stage 2a accept. Companion to wmkf_AiUsePolicyVersion lookup.

relationships.lookupDescription: The exact wmkf_policyversion row the reviewer acknowledged for COI at Stage 2a accept. Pinning to the specific child preserves what the reviewer actually saw, even if staff later activates a different version on the parent. Default Restrict cascade prevents hard-delete of referenced version rows.
Same shape as wmkf_CoiPolicyVersion, AI-use slot.
